title: Fantastic Crafting
description:
A small mod to boost your crafting-experience.
Allows you to craft logs into chest, sticks, slabs, stairs, doors and trapdoors, saving you time.
body:
A small mod to boost your crafting-experience.
Allows you to craft logs into chests, sticks, slabs, stairs, doors and trapdoors, saving you time.
By placing logs in the typical patterns, you are now able to craft multiple items of a given recipe, allowing you to skip crafting steps.
